catalog_content:
Item Name: GINSIN 12 Botanics Gin Alcohol-Free 0.0% Non-Alcoholic Spirit, Mocktail Mixer, From Spain 700ml Bullet Point 1: Package Includes: 1 x GINSIN Botanics Non-Alcoholic (0.0%) Gin Alternative 700ml. Bullet Point 2: Tasting Notes: Aromatic blend of botanicals such as coriander, cinnamon, lavender, lemon, hibiscus, orange blossoms and more. Vibrant citrus flavor with a slightly bitter finish. Bullet Point 3: Great for Designated Drivers: Don't forget your alcohol-free guests when selecting drink options! Bullet Point 4: Best served with tonic/soda or as the base for non-alcoholic cocktails. Bullet Point 5: A great alcohol-free base to create amazing cocktails - ideal for those that enjoy Gin & Tonics without the negative consequences from drinking alcohol. Product Description: GINSIN 12 Botanics is a non-alcoholic alternative to gin created with botanicals which include juniper, cardamom, cilantro, sweet orange, bitter orange, lemon, cinnamon, orange blossom, violet hibiscus, lavender and myrtle. This non-alcoholic alternative, with its vibrant citrus flavors, mixed with tonic water, is reminiscent of Bombay Sapphire.

We always recommend GINSIN be served as over lots of ice, partnered with a mixer, and never drank neat.

Created by Industrias Espadafor in Andalucia, Spain, GINSIN products are designed as an alternative to gin for use in mocktails. GINSIN has never been fermented, making it the perfect addition to mocktails, for individuals who do not drink alcohol. Value: 23.6 Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Premium non-alcoholic spirit alternative positioned as a high-quality mocktail base. Glass bottle packaging and botanical complexity suggest a mid-to-high price point, targeting consumers seeking sophisticated alcohol-free options. Brand emphasizes craftsmanship and mixability, justifying premium pricing compared to standard non-alcoholic beverages.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Twinings of London Jasmine Green Tea K-Cup Pods for Keurig, 12 Count
Bullet Point 1: FRESH FLAVOR: One box of 12 Jasmine Green tea K-Cups. Green tea scented with jasmine flowers. Using a Keurig Brewer, press the 6-oz. or 8 oz. brew button for optimal flavor.
Bullet Point 2: ONLY THE FINEST QUALITY: Our expert blenders source only the finest leaves cultivated to our exacting standards by trusted growers around the world. From these tea gardens we hand-select the leaves that will shape your next Twinings moment.
Bullet Point 3: JASMINE GREEN TEA: Pure green tea expertly blended and infused with real jasmine flowers to deliver a fragrant tea with a unique floral aroma and taste.
Bullet Point 4: RICH HISTORY: In 1706 Thomas Twining began selling fine tea from an English storefront in The Strand, London. Today, Twinings still sells some of the world's best teas from the original store and in more than 100 countries throughout the world.
Bullet Point 5: HAND SELECTED FOR YOUR HOME: Made without artificial ingredients, Twinings natural teas provide a wholesome tea experience. If you enjoy Bigelow Tea, Lipton Tea, Harney & Sons Tea, Davidson's Tea, or Prince of Peace Tea - try Twining's of London Tea.
Value: 12.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Premium single-serve tea pods from a heritage brand with 300+ years of expertise. Positioned as high-quality with natural ingredients and a unique floral aroma. Convenience-focused packaging for Keurig machines, targeting tea enthusiasts seeking specialty flavors. Pricing likely reflects brand prestige and specialized format rather than commodity pricing.
